_comment: Snapshot of the branch-protection rules applied to 'main'. Authoritative configuration lives on GitHub; this file is a reviewable record. Any change here must match a gh api call in a dedicated PR.
notes: enforce_admins=true means even the repo admin (Ghislain) is subject to these rules — bypass requires deliberate toggle-off.
required_approving_review_count=0 because Ghislain is sole admin; the integrity gate is Ghislain manually clicking Merge, not a GH review count.
allow_force_pushes=false on main; feature branches can be force-pushed.
Pre-cutover: Ghislain merges PRs manually after green CI (Option A per plan §5.0).
Post-cutover: same rule — no change needed.
